home.heroTagline: Your safety is our priority. Protecting passengers and ensuring law and order across railway premises 24/7.
home.dgpQuote: Our commitment is to ensure the safety and security of every railway passenger. Together, we strive for a safer Andhra Pradesh.
home.dgpSignature: Sri K. Harishkumar Gupta, I.P.S., Director General of Police, Andhra Pradesh
